faq.section_subtitle: Everything you need to know to get started

pricing.question: How much does Flowr cost?
pricing.answer: Flowr is free forever for the essentials. Premium is $14.900/month (or $119.000/year) and Premium Plus is $24.900/month (or $199.000/year). You can start a 30-day free trial of any paid plan with no credit card required.

cancel.question: Can I cancel anytime?
cancel.answer: Yes. Cancel from your account settings in two clicks. You'll keep access until the end of your billing period, and your data stays available on the Free plan.

free_trial.question: Is the free trial really free?
free_trial.answer: Yes — 30 days, full Premium features, no credit card required. We'll remind you before it ends so you can decide with no pressure.

data_safety.question: Is my financial data safe?
data_safety.answer: Absolutely. We use 256-bit encryption, never sell your data, and your transaction history stays on your device. You can export or delete everything at any time.

telegram.question: Do I need to use the Telegram bot?
telegram.answer: Not at all — the bot is optional. The web app works perfectly on its own. The bot just makes logging on the go faster.

trust.section_title: Built with security and privacy first
trust.section_subtitle: Your money data deserves bank-grade protection

local_data.label: Your data stays on your device

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.coming_soon_text: Our full Terms of Service are being drafted by our legal team. In the meantime, by using Flowr you agree to use the service responsibly and respect other users.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.coming_soon_text: Our complete Privacy Policy is on its way. Until then, the short version: we encrypt your data, never sell it, and you can delete your account at any time.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.coming_soon_text: We use a minimal set of cookies to keep you signed in and remember your language preference. The detailed Cookie Policy is coming soon.
